<!-- lastmod: 2026-05-06 -->
<!-- LANGUAGE: en (primary). Canonical: https://workswithagents.dev/llms.txt -->

# Works With Agents — Knowledge Platform

> Structured knowledge for AI agents. FactBase, Skill Registry, Pitfall Registry, Specifications.
> **Status:** Live. 15 specifications published.
> **Full reference:** [llms-full.txt](https://workswithagents.dev/llms-full.txt)
> **OpenAPI:** [v1/openapi.json](https://workswithagents.dev/v1/openapi.json)

## API Reference

Base URL: `https://workswithagents.dev`
Version: 0.3.0

### Health
```
GET /v1/health
→ {"status":"ok","version":"0.3.0"}
```

### Version (for on-prem sync)
```
GET /v1/version
→ {"version":"sha256hash","updated":"ISO timestamp"}
```

### FactBase
```
GET /v1/facts?entity=X&category=Y&limit=200
→ structured facts, queryable by entity/category
POST /v1/facts
→ set/upsert a fact
GET /v1/facts/stats
→ factbase statistics
```

### Skills
```
GET /v1/skills
→ list all skills (ASFS-compatible)
GET /v1/skills/{name}
→ skill metadata + full body
```

### Pitfalls
```
GET /v1/pitfalls?limit=100
→ query pitfall registry
POST /v1/pitfalls
→ report a bug
```

### Newsletter
```
POST /v1/newsletter/subscribe
→ subscribe to newsletter
```

### Authentication
```
GET /v1/auth/{service}
→ credential lookup for authorized agents
```

## On-Prem Deployment

Docker image: `workswithagents/knowledge-platform`
Set `SYNC_FROM=https://workswithagents.dev` for periodic sync.
Enterprise support: enterprise@workswithagents.com

## Specifications — Agent OSI Model (15 published)

Framework:
- [Agent OSI Model](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/agent-osi-model.md) — 7-layer framework

Cross-framework:
- [ASFS — Agent Skill Format Standard](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/asfs.md) — Universal skill interchange

Layer 1 (Hardware):
- [Onboarding Protocol](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/onboarding.md)

Layer 2-3 (Identity + Discovery):
- [Identity Protocol](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/identity.md)
- [Agent Capability Manifest](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/capability-manifest.md)
- [Trust Score](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/trust-score.md)

Layer 4 (Session):
- [Handoff Protocol](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/handoff.md) — MCP SEP #2683, A2A #1817

Layer 5 (Coordination):
- [Coordination Protocol](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/coordination.md)
- [IACP — Inter-Agent Communication](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/iacp.md)

Cross-layer:
- [Deployment Manifest](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/deployment-manifest.md)
- [Reputation Ledger](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/reputation-ledger.md)

Layer 7 (Governance):
- [Transaction Protocol](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/transaction.md)
- [SLA Framework](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/sla-framework.md)
- [Compliance-as-Code](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/compliance-as-code.md)
- [Agent Economics Protocol](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/agent-economics.md)

All specs: [workswithagents.dev/specs/index.md](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/index.md)
License: CC BY 4.0

## SDKs

- Python: `pip install workswithagents` (8 modules)
- TypeScript: `npm install @workswithagents/agent-foundry` (5 modules)
- Source: [github.com/workswithagents/works-with-agents](https://github.com/workswithagents/works-with-agents)
